text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The gods and the great Shiraoki have<n>done it! Oh,
and you too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With this many plushies, you and I<n>will never run
dry of good luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Please take some too, Trainer! Then<n>we'll have
twice the luck! No, even<n>better, we'll have our luck
raised to<n>the second power!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now, with our<n>super-duper-ultra-mega-great
blessing, no one can stand against<n>us!
